summary:
Formal definition of the Monolith Bio-Sovereignty Protocol (Health OS).
Captures the architecture for:
1. Diagnostic Lab (Real-time input via Dexcom, Vivoo, SiPhox).
2. Autonomous Kitchen (Bison/Sweet Potato procurement & cooking).
3. Recovery Chamber (EightSleep, Air Scrubbing, Circadian Light).
4. Bio-Link Logic (Data-driven lifestyle adjustments).
